notes: Policy and architecture topics for human review — not auto-loop work. Edit items here; run python scripts/ppe_human_backlog.py render-md to refresh the readable doc. Weekly ntfy digest includes open high-priority titles.

items.title: Product lane automation
items.summary: Auto-spawn IDE build on PRODUCT_BLOCKED, or switch product slices to ACP, or inline IDE build in the deterministic worker.
items.policyQuestion: Stay near-zero-API (local profile) vs pay for full autonomous product slices?

items.title: Relay decision model reconcile
items.summary: AUTO_ADVANCE decision (or fold Rule 7b into CONTINUE); align CODEX_AUTONOMY §15 with implementation; auto PR on REPO_STATE_DRIFT for all slice kinds.
items.policyQuestion: How much steward judgment should remain vs machine CONTINUE?

items.title: Guard framework v2
items.summary: Per-guard block|warn|off policy; context bands advisory-only; drop maxPhaseSlices in favor of batch window only.
items.policyQuestion: Which guards should ever hard-stop the loop vs notify only?

items.title: Focus / validation lifecycle
items.summary: Per-chapter evidence gates in backlog; retire global P8 report gate; re-enable only during tester cohort windows.
items.policyQuestion: When does validation report gate come back after interim COMPLETE?

items.title: SELECTION and backlog governance
items.summary: Auto-charter scaffold rows; steward API charter on local profile; parallel MSOS tracks with explicit dependency DAG.
items.policyQuestion: Can MSOS chapters run in parallel or stay strictly linear blocked chains?

items.title: Infrastructure / ops hardening
items.summary: Health gate warn-only for non-critical issues; soften preflight dirty-tree in sandbox; auto-heal STALE_STATE without exit 7.
items.policyQuestion: How much repo drift is acceptable during operator sandbox?

items.title: Founder / canon policy
items.summary: Which PPE_MASTER hard stops agents may auto-resolve; PR-only vs direct control-plane edits; cross-layer slice exceptions.
items.policyQuestion: What stays human-only forever vs delegated envelope?

items.title: Observability — human vs informational stops
items.summary: OPERATOR_STATUS needs_human vs informational_stop; skip ntfy on auto-recovered exit 20; workflow radar noise reduction.
items.policyQuestion: What deserves a phone ping vs weekly digest only?
